repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_phase_v1: Support Proposition 1 null-annihilator criterion for proximal ATE point identification

published_prior_art.cite: ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023 and Santos2011JoE: linear target functionals may be identified despite nonunique nuisance/bridge functions

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_proximal_phase_v1: native threshold and selection-range geometry after ATE-active nonuniqueness

published_prior_art.cite: GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 gives proxy partial-ID bounds without completeness; ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023 gives nonunique-bridge functional identification
BennettKallusMaoNeweySyrgkanisUehara2023 and ChenReiss2011 already cover weakly identified inverse-problem functionals/rate regimes

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the finite support-function LP and row-space frontier read as a proximal long-term specialization of known linear-functional/partial-ID machinery unless sharpened into a strict theorem-level frontier against GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 and ZhangLiMiaoTchetgen2023.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist misses Bennett et al. 2023 COLT 'Minimax Instrumental Variable Regression and L2 Convergence Guarantees without Identification or Closedness', a closer comparator for penalized selectors under nonuniqueness/weak identification.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Clause (iii) requires endpoint bridge arrays to be 'represented by a finite proximal negative-control mean law', but that realizability object is not formally defined in Section 6 or 7.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a formal definition of finite proximal negative-control mean-law realization and state the exact endpoint-realization predicate Conjecture 1 is claiming.

Reframe Conjecture 1 as a strict comparator theorem: identify the precise GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 bound object and prove the proposed R_LT either equals, sharpens, or operationalizes it in the long-term two-sample class.

Upgrade Conjecture 2 by adding an explicit equivalence/non-equivalence frontier against KallusMaoUehara2021 and Bennett et al. 2023b, with the observable omega_n threshold tied to coverage or risk guarantees.

recommended_next_step: Patch the realizability definition and either sharpen the two conjectures into strict published-comparator frontiers or accept a field-tier proposal.
